quick_skim.title: Analyzing the Narration Gap in LLM-Solver Loops
quick_skim.abstract: Formal tools such as SAT and SMT solvers are increasingly embedded in language model reasoning pipelines when a safety or security critical question can be formulated in logic. Unlike chain of thought whose steps are sampled from the model distribution without formal guarantee, a solver produces a sound and independently verifiable answer. However, the soundness guarantee can be lost in the interaction between the solver and the model. The hybrid pipeline has three components: formalizing the question, deciding it, and narrating the result. Prior work has studied the formalization and decision, but not narration, which is the step that turns a formal tool's output into the user answer. To fill the narration gap, we first model the LLM-solver loop as a verified decision procedure. We further evaluate five open-sourced models under prompt injection, and we find certificate gating makes the solver verdict sound, while an adversary can invert a verified conclusion across phrasings and channels. We study the mitigation through hardened prompt that reduces injection significantly but cannot eliminate it and still suffers under adaptive attack. Combining the formal analysis and empirical studies, we show in the LLM-solver loop, robustness does not reach to the answer that the user finally reads.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM-solver loop for formal verification applicable to hardware
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: LLM与求解器交互循环在形式验证中的应用，可迁移至硬件
quick_skim.llm_evidence: LLM与求解器交互循环在形式验证中的应用，可迁移至硬件
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: LLM与求解器交互循环在形式验证中的应用，可迁移至硬件
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Analyzes the narration gap in LLM-solver loops where formal tools like SAT are used, proposing a verified decision procedure to ensure correctness; relevant to using LLMs for formal verification.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文分析了在LLM与SAT/SMT等求解器组成的混合管线中存在的'叙述间隙'问题，即求解器输出转化为用户答案时可能丢失正确性保证。提出了一个经过验证的决策过程来填补这一间隙，并形式化了该管线。该工作为LLM辅助硬件形式验证中如何保证推理可靠性提供了方法论基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文分析了在LLM与SAT/SMT等求解器组成的混合管线中存在的'叙述间隙'问题，即求解器输出转化为用户答案时可能丢失正确性保证。提出了一个经过验证的决策过程来填补这一间隙，并形式化了该管线。该工作为LLM辅助硬件形式验证中如何保证推理可靠性提供了方法论基础。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?

quick_skim.title: LLM4RTL: Tool-Assisted LLM for RTL Generation
quick_skim.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have facilitated impressive progress in software engineering, code generation, tooling, and systems. Concurrently, a significant body of research has developed which explores a growing variety of methods and systems for applying LLMs to hardware and chip design (e.g., systems for RTL code generation based on functional description). However, when it comes to open Verilog/RTL code-generation, we need high-quality training samples to build specialized and more effective LLM systems through fine-tuning or low-rank adaptation. Here, we propose a ``judge-renew-check-renew-check'' (JRCRC) pipeline which updates a current public dataset using a hierarchy of state-of-the-art commercial LLM models differing in their costs and capabilities in RTL code generation. This approach achieves a cost-effective mechanism for filtering and refining code-generation samples into a higher-quality training dataset. Our experiments also identify some common weaknesses of LLMs in rule-based reasoning and logic, and consequently, in RTL code-generation. Having identified these weaknesses, we develop an architecture for incorporating pre-processing tools to dynamically assist the LLMs in inferring logical relationships from tabular data formats. With our tools-assisted architecture for RTL code generation, we achieve significant overall performance gains in the VerilogEval benchmark and outperform many state-of-the-art methods. Our LLM4RTL system achieves performance comparable to that of GPT-4O using a significantly much smaller LLM.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM for RTL generation, closely related to RTL verification with LLMs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: LLM用于RTL生成，与LLM进行RTL验证紧密相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: LLM用于RTL生成，与LLM进行RTL验证紧密相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: LLM用于RTL生成，与LLM进行RTL验证紧密相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a judge-renew-check pipeline to improve LLM-generated RTL code quality using commercial models; relevant to LLM-assisted hardware design and verification.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对大语言模型在RTL代码生成中面临的数据质量瓶颈，提出了一个'判断-更新-检查-更新-检查'（JRCRC）管线。该管线利用分层级商业LLM模型对公开数据集进行迭代优化，生成高质量训练样本以微调专用LLM。实验表明该方法能显著提升生成RTL的正确率，为后续进行形式验证提供了更可靠的代码基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对大语言模型在RTL代码生成中面临的数据质量瓶颈，提出了一个'判断-更新-检查-更新-检查'（JRCRC）管线。该管线利用分层级商业LLM模型对公开数据集进行迭代优化，生成高质量训练样本以微调专用LLM。实验表明该方法能显著提升生成RTL的正确率，为后续进行形式验证提供了更可靠的代码基础。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索关于大语言模型在硬件形式验证中应用的论文。, especially work that connects or combines: large language model for hardware formal verification; hardware formal verification using large language models; RTL verification with LLMs; What are the latest advances in applying LLMs to formal verification of RTL designs?; Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?.
